summary: Pic4Pic Web Frontend & Landing Page Testing Complete - UI Implementation Verified, Backend AI Moderation Blocked by Invalid API Key

critical_bugs.issue: AI image moderation fails with 'API key not valid' error from Google Gemini API
critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKS all Pic4Pic functionality - users cannot initiate photo exchanges
critical_bugs.root_cause: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env is not a valid Gemini API key. Moderation system defaults to provider='gemini' but the key 'sk-emergent-fD72224061aDc58Dd5' is invalid for Google's Generative Language API
critical_bugs.error_details: litellm.AuthenticationError: GeminiException - API key not valid. Please pass a valid API key.

working_endpoints.details: Returns landing config with hero, sections, blog teaser
Returns exchange status (null when no exchange exists)
Returns match list with correct metadata

passed_tests: Guest Landing Page - Loads correctly with hero, sections, footer, navigation
Landing Page Hero - Headline, subheadline, primary/secondary CTAs present
Landing Page Sections - 'Warum Eros?' section with features visible
Landing Page Footer - Legal links (Nutzungsbedingungen, Datenschutz, Impressum) present
Landing Page Navigation - Login and Register buttons visible
Authenticated User Login - testing@test.com login successful
Root Route Redirect - Authenticated users redirected from / to /discover (HomeOrLanding component working)
Matches Page - Displays match list correctly
Chat Page Navigation - Can navigate to chat from matches
Pic4Pic Panel Rendering - IDLE state panel visible in regular (non-system) matches
Pic4Pic Panel UI Elements - Start button ('Pic4Pic starten') visible and enabled
Pic4Pic Panel Text - Correct German description displayed
Pic4Pic Panel File Input - Hidden file input present with correct data-testid
Pic4Pic Panel Conditional Rendering - Correctly hidden in locked/system matches
Chat Page - Self-destruct toggle visible in unlocked matches
Chat Page - Message input and send button functional
Backend API - GET /api/landing returns correct structure
Backend API - GET /api/pic4pic/match/{match_id} returns correct structure
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix AI moderation API key configuration. The EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env is not a valid Gemini API key. Options: 1) Obtain valid Gemini API key and update backend/.env or db.settings, 2) Configure alternative provider (OpenAI/Anthropic) in db.settings.ai_moderation, or 3) Disable moderation temporarily by setting enabled=false in db.settings.ai_moderation. Without this fix, Pic4Pic photo exchange cannot function (initiate/respond endpoints fail with 400 Bad Request). All other Pic4Pic UI components are correctly implemented and ready to use once backend moderation is fixed.

success_percentage.backend: 75% (3/4 Pic4Pic endpoints tested - GET works, POST blocked by AI key issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components render correctly, routing works, panel visibility logic correct)

guest_landing_page.details: Landing page loads correctly for unauthenticated users. Hero section with headline 'Verbinde dich mit Menschen, die dich wirklich sehen.' displays properly. Primary CTA 'Kostenlos starten' and secondary CTA 'Anmelden' are visible. Sections (Warum Eros?) with features (Sicher, Inklusiv, Werbefrei) render correctly. Footer with legal links present.

authenticated_routing.details: HomeOrLanding component correctly redirects authenticated users from / to /discover. After login, users land on /discover page. No infinite redirect loops observed. Loading state shows briefly during auth resolution.

pic4pic_panel_ui.details: Pic4PicPanel component renders correctly in chat pages for regular (non-system) matches. IDLE state shows: 1) Shield icon with 'Pic4Pic' label, 2) German description text explaining secure photo exchange, 3) 'Pic4Pic starten' button (visible, enabled), 4) Hidden file input with data-testid='pic4pic-file-input'. Panel correctly hidden in locked/system matches (e.g., Eros official match).

pic4pic_backend_integration.details: Backend Pic4Pic endpoints exist and respond, but POST /api/pic4pic/initiate fails with 400 Bad Request due to invalid Gemini API key. GET /api/pic4pic/match/{match_id} works correctly and returns null when no exchange exists. The frontend is ready to integrate once backend AI moderation is fixed.
